category_sources: source_facts.description says librasterlite2 stores and retrieves huge raster coverages; official Fossil page says it uses a SpatiaLite DBMS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is librasterlite2; official Gaia-GIS Fossil page title is librasterlite2.
docs_sources: Official Gaia-GIS Fossil project page includes documentation and tutorials links and describes the library.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official Fossil source-control project page with timeline, branches, tags, tickets, and wiki links.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names raster coverage storage; official project page states storage and retrieval uses a SpatiaLite DBMS.
